title: CyanLib
description: Library for anyone tu use, with small utilities that I use in my mods
body:
![banner](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/ProfilePage/blob/main/images/banner_cyanlib.png)

[![fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![gitbook](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/gitbook_vector.svg)](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/CyanLib/tree/main/item/doc/DOCS.md)

<details>
<summary>🎴 Show available versions</summary>

|   MC Version    | Up to date | Latest Version |
|:---------------:|:----------:|:--------------:|
| 1.17.x / 1.18.x |     ❌      |     0.1.8      |
|     1.19.x      |     ✅      |     latest     |
|     1.20.x      |     ✅      |     latest     |
|     1.21.x      |     ✅      |     latest     |
|      26.x       |     ✅      |     latest     |

</details>

***

📖 This mod is a library, so it is meant to be used alongside other mods

#### ✅ List of features (see the wiki for more information) :

- Config system (with screen on client)
- Custom translations
- Some other smaller functionalities

***

> If you find any issue, please make sure to report it here: https://todo.sr.ht/~aeldit/CyanLib so I can fix it
>
> If you have a suggestion, you can go on my discord server and create a post in 🗽-suggestions-forum
>
> [![discord_badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/750243612473819188?color=7289da&label=DISCORD&logo=discord&logoColor=7289da&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/PcYPpqzhKS)
